network_summary: Dr. Peter J. Pullara Jr., DDS (Marquette 1988) owns and operates two private family dental offices in suburban Chicagoland: Broadway Family Dental Center in Coal City (ZIP 60416) and Plainfield Family Dental Center in Plainfield (ZIP 60544). Both locations share EIN 271445093 and carry Dr. Pullara's name in BBB/third-party profiles. No MSO, DSO platform, management company, or PE backer was found. This is a classic dentist-owned two-office private group.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Peter J. Pullara Jr., DDS — Marquette University DDS 1988; practicing since 1988 in Will/Grundy County IL area
durable_artifacts: Shared EIN 271445093 across both location_ids (f32172ada670178a and 67a9f4133ccaa70c)
NPPES authorized official PETER PULLARA on both NPI 1922378900 (Coal City) and NPI 1861607798 (Plainfield)
BBB profile titled 'Plainfield Family Dental Cntr./Dr. Pullara Jr' — business started 1 Jan 1990, A+ rating
Third-party profiles (Healthgrades, WebMD, Vitals, DentalPlans) list Dr. Peter J. Pullara at both Coal City and Plainfield offices
Separate consumer websites broadwayfamilydentalus.com and plainfieldfamilydentalus.com both in 'Family Dental Center' brand family under Dr. Pullara
evidence_chain: AO signal: NPPES authorized official PETER PULLARA appears on both NPI 1922378900 (Broadway Family Dental Center, Coal City 60416) and NPI 1861607798 (Plainfield Family Dental Center, Plainfield 60544) — reach=2, both share EIN 271445093. Documentary corroboration: (1) BBB profile 'Plainfield Family Dental Cntr./Dr. Pullara Jr' directly ties the doctor's name to Plainfield practice (bbb.org URL); (2) broadwayfamilydentalus.com staff page lists Dr. Peter J. Pullara Jr. DDS as lead dentist at Coal City; (3) plainfieldfamilydentalus.com is the consumer website for the Plainfield location; (4) Healthgrades, WebMD, and Vitals provider profiles list Dr. Pullara as practicing at both Coal City and Plainfield addresses; (5) no MSO, management company, PE backer, or DSO platform reference found in any source.
future_app_notes: No outstanding open questions — dentist-multi is well-corroborated. If a third location (Seneca IL) surfaces in a future NPPES pull under the same AO, re-evaluate still as dentist_multi unless a management layer appears. EIN 271445093 can be used as a durable cluster key.
